overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a rainy walk through downtown Los Santos. The player traverses a corporate plaza, crosses a busy wet street with traffic, and ascends the exterior stairs of the Union Depository building to reach an elevated terrace overlooking the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza with palm trees and skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the tops of the surrounding skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking through the rain-soaked corporate plaza while looking up at the towering glass skyscrapers

entered.detail: modern glass and steel skyscraper with illuminated windows rising above the plaza
tall palm trees lining the left side of the corporate plaza
flagpole with American flag visible near the building entrance
cluster of cylindrical glass towers with distinctive curved architecture
wide stone steps leading up to the building entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking through a rain-soaked corporate plaza surrounded by modern glass skyscrapers and palm trees. The camera tilts upward to take in the towering architecture while moving forward across the paved plaza, with the American flag visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with active traffic

events.description: descends from plaza to street level, entering active traffic area with wet pavement
vintage taxi and black sedan visible waiting at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet city street and navigating through the intersection with active traffic

notable_agents.action: vintage blue and white taxi with roof sign waiting at the intersection
black sedan stopped in traffic next to the taxi

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with dark glass facade, the main building being approached
rain-soaked multi-lane road with reflective surface and visible puddles
traffic signal pole at the street corner
depressed highway lane running parallel to the street

segments.scene_description: Moving from the plaza down to the wet city street with active traffic. The camera walks along the road past a vintage taxi and black sedan waiting at the intersection, with the Union Depository tower looming ahead and a sunken highway visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: bank entrance with exterior staircase and signage

events.description: large illuminated Union Depository sign comes into view
begins ascending the wide exterior stone stairs toward the entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the Union Depository entrance and climbing the exterior stone staircase

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with red and blue lettering reading 'Union Depository'
wide stone staircase leading up to the building entrance
pair of modern phone booths at the base of the stairs
well-maintained green hedges lining the stairway
multi-story white parking garage with red vertical accents

segments.scene_description: Approaching the Union Depository building, passing the illuminated sign and landscaped hedges. The camera begins ascending the exterior stone stairs leading up to the building's elevated entrance, leaving the street traffic behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace overlooking parking lot and highway

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs, revealing the parking lot and highway overlook
view opens up to show construction cranes and distant city skyline

agents.ego_description: reaching the terrace and looking out over the parking lot, highway, and distant construction site

entered.detail: open concrete platform at the top of the stairs with rain puddles
sunken parking lot with parked cars visible below the terrace
elevated highway structure running parallel to the building
multiple tower cranes visible against the skyline indicating active construction
tall building with clock visible in the distant skyline
modern glass and steel entrance structure of the building

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the elevated terrace at the top of the stairs, revealing a panoramic view of the sunken parking lot, highway overpass, and distant construction cranes against the rainy city skyline. The glass entrance canopy of the Union Depository is visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-soaked corporate plaza up to an elevated urban vantage point. It begins by moving across a paved plaza flanked by palm trees, with the camera tilting upward to capture the towering glass skyscrapers and a distant American flag. As the camera descends from the plaza to the wet city street, it passes a vintage taxi and a black sedan waiting at an intersection while the Union Depository tower looms ahead. The scene then shifts toward the building's base, passing illuminated signage and landscaped hedges before ascending a set of exterior stone stairs that lift the perspective above the street traffic. Finally, the camera emerges onto an elevated terrace, revealing a panoramic view of a sunken parking lot, highway overpasses, and distant construction cranes against the rainy skyline.
